name: Edu Lobo
abstract: Eduardo de Góes "Edu" Lobo (born August 29, 1943) is a Brazilian singer, guitarist, and composer. In the 1960s he was part of the bossa nova movement.

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral
about_quotes.evidence: we met Antonio Carlos Jobim, we met Joao Gilberto, we met Carlos Lyra, Edu Lobo, and Astrud was married to Joao at the time
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 22, 1998
